e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Windows fkwu now proves response bytes as well as request bytes over the socket host-call floor: a PATCH request is rendered, sent, answered with a framed HTTP response, received through socket_recv, and parsed by Form status/body/completeness recipes without http_get or sock_request.
public_endpoints: local-only: Form stdlib and Windows fkwu verifier; no public HTTP endpoint changed
test_flows: High-grammar response proof: http-client-socket-response validates to 8191 on Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu with 0 divergent.
